strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Strong testing/craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops taught)
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership or recognized AI expertise
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Director/Principal-level scope
No advanced degree and limited large-organization or strategic advisory experience

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Seniority and scope vs. Principal/Director IC bar

response.justification: The candidate is a capable, broad senior engineer with strong craftsmanship and some early exposure to agentic/MCP tooling, but the role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, strategic advisory experience, and a track record of shipping AI products or platforms — none of which are evident here. Tenure and titles fall short of the 15-year Principal bar focused on AI strategy.
